event_anchor.label: Event Anchor
event_anchor.description: Canon event that changes world or character state.

knowledge_gate.label: Knowledge Gate
knowledge_gate.description: Controls who knows a fact by date.

age_gate.label: Age Gate
age_gate.description: Computes or constrains character age by date.

spell_gate.label: Spell Gate
spell_gate.description: Controls spell knowledge, learning date, and plausible magical ability.

skill_band.label: Skill Band
skill_band.description: Broad ability expectations for a school year or training level.

institution_state.label: Institution State
institution_state.description: Date-sensitive status of places, offices, classes, and institutions.

knowledge_guard.label: Knowledge Guard
knowledge_guard.description: A negative or protective story-state gate that remains active until its story milestone happens.

story_milestone.label: Story Milestone
story_milestone.description: A roleplay event that activates, expires, blocks, or diverges date-sensitive lore.

lifecycle_gate.label: Lifecycle Gate
lifecycle_gate.description: Controls whether lore is active, future, blocked, expired, or canon-overdue.

character_state.label: Character State
character_state.description: Date-sensitive character role, status, or established state.

artifact_state.label: Artifact State
artifact_state.description: Date-sensitive ownership, condition, or meaning of an important object.

public_belief.label: Public Belief
public_belief.description: What a group believes, including false or incomplete public narratives.

faction_state.label: Faction State
faction_state.description: Date-sensitive status of a group, institution, house, or faction.

continuity_rule.label: Continuity Rule
continuity_rule.description: General rule that prevents broad continuity mistakes.

data_cleanup.label: Data Cleanup
data_cleanup.description: Internal maintenance marker, not intended for injection.
